wombos.definition: A prophecy delivered bro-to-bro — a prediction made by a twuh or brousin that carries the full weight of bro-coded wisdom. 'Did you hear the brophecy, bruh?'
The state of being unable to sleep and maximally doom-scrolling through short-form video reels in bed — sleeplessness fueled entirely by endless online content.
wombos.example: I was reelsomniamaxxing until 4 a.m. and watched things I can never unsee.
